title: Mustafar panning droid
content:

{{Quote|Reconfiguration of the panning droids is proceeding behind schedule. The units are strangely skittish around organics, particularly those workers dressed in black.|Excerpt from [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo's]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] Reclamation Report|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mustafar panning droid''', also known as the '''droid lava collector''', was a fifth-degree [[Droid/Legends|droid]] modified by the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] from the [[Kalibac Industries]] [[information cataloging droid]]. These so-called panning droids operated on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], [[Mining/Legends|mining]] minerals from the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] lava rivers.

==Overview==
[[File:Panning-droid_negtd.png|thumb|left|150px|A panning droid with lava-resistant cauldron.]]

The Kalibac librarian droid was initially developed for the [[Mid Rim Lending Network]], but Kalibac's parent company, the Techno Union, used the internal intelligence matrices from factory-model librarian droids within an imitative body shell crafted from heat-resistant [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]], set for use by [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarian]] miners. The droids, produced on Mustafar itself, were programmed to use their scanners to locate minerals brought to the surface of lava floes by [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]]. The panning droids were fitted with large, underslung collection buckets to transport minerals from the rivers back to Techno Union harvesting centers.

As an additional defense against the scorching heat of the planet, panning droids were fitted with low-powered [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generators]], though losses to the flames of the lava rivers were still high. The panning droid possessed only a rudimentary droid brain: its orders were transmitted to it from the [[Klegger Corp Mining Facility/Legends|primary mining facility]]. Although expensive, these droids proved their worth by the enormous profits gained from mining rare heavy elements.

==History==
[[File:Mustafar_mining_droids.jpg|right|280px|thumb|Mustafar panning droids used by the [[Mensix Mining Company]] along with [[Mining Droid MK3|mining droids MK3]] and [[DLC-13 Mining Droid|DLC-13 mining droids]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].]]
Following the culmination of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], several panning droids bore witness to the [[Duel on Mustafar/Legends|duel]] between [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. One droid, currently devoid of any particular task, set its [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] on the duel as it progressed across precarious terrain, while another became more personally involved. Escaping from a fallen lava collection arm tumbling over a lavafall, Vader leapt onto the carbonite head of a panning droid in order to pursue Kenobi. Vader used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to override the droid's steering controls, distressing the unit enough to cause it to drop its collection bucket into the lava below.<ref name="RotS" />

During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], panning droids saw continued service on Mustafar, particularly as part of a reclamation project helmed by the [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]].

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], one droid lava collector went rogue and reprogrammed other droids to serve him in a Corellian hideout. It was eventually destroyed by [[Bane Malar/Legends|Bane Malar]] and his companion.<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Galactic Hunters|scenario=Destroy All Droids promotional scenario}}</ref>
